keys.description: Fallback accuracy tolerance when the branch row doesn't specify one.
Fallback radius when the branch has no polygon AND no explicit radius.
Reject polygons spanning more than this diameter. PolygonEvaluator's tangent-plane approximation loses accuracy beyond ~10km.
Fraction of preflight calls that emit the `geofence.health_check` log line. Reduce for high-volume mobile fleets.
The approval_tasks.type value we filter on when the approval event fires.
Non-configurable floor; workspace setting cannot go below this for override rows.
After soft-delete + anonymisation, retain for this many years then hard-delete.
When true, refuse evaluations with subject_type not registered in the morph map. Turn off during migrations from legacy class-name subject_type values.
